creator: szczepan@szczepan.net
text:
Maybe this can help also:

root@freebsd:~ # pciconf -l -v
pcib1@pci0:0:0:0:       class=0x060400 rev=0x01 hdr=0x01 vendor=0x1d87 device=0x3566 subvendor=0x0000 subdevice=0x0000
    vendor     = 'Rockchip Electronics Co., Ltd'
    device     = 'RK3568 Remote Signal Processor'
    class      = bridge
    subclass   = PCI-PCI
nvme0@pci0:1:0:0:       class=0x010802 rev=0x01 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x1217 device=0x8760 subvendor=0x1217 subdevice=0x0002
    vendor     = 'O2 Micro, Inc.'
    device     = 'FORESEE E2M2 NVMe SSD'
    class      = mass storage
    subclass   = NVM
